insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. This hook and the block_progress capability it depends on will no longer be supported in future versions. Existing extensions will continue to work until the official deprecation date.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should migrate their checkout UI extensions to use alternative hooks and capabilities. They should review the documentation for the latest checkout UI extensions API to ensure compatibility and update their code accordingly. The block_progress capability will also be removed, so developers need to find alternative solutions for blocking progress in the checkout journey.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to use the latest API version. They should encourage their developers to migrate to the new API to avoid any disruptions to their checkout process.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is important because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which are critical for merchants to provide a seamless checkout experience for their customers. Developers need to take action to ensure their extensions remain compatible and functional.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, requiring updates to setLineItemDiscount and bulkSetLineItemDiscounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions now result in fewer breaking changes, giving server-side code more control over field mismatches.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically, resolving the runtime_url on every execution and using the new URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, including updates to App Update, Javy dependencies, and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Updated App Store Requirements: Always use honest and transparent review practices, with further clarification on policy 1.3.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: Customer Account API: Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types will be removed in version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting from API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting from version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS Extensions, App Pricing, and Flow with new features and requirements

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI updates
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support background extension targets, and POS UI extensions have updated line item discount handling. The pos.app.ready.data target allows extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering UI. Additionally, FixedAmount line item discounts must represent per-unit discounts in POS UI extensions API version 2026-07.

themes.title: App Pricing, Flow, and Security updates
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Shopify Flow has also been updated with changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. Furthermore, Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, and App Store Requirements have been upda…

themes.title: Deprecation and Removal notices
themes.detail: The Customer Account API version 2026-10 will remove the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the associated Checkout type subtree. Developers should review their apps for any dependencies on these fields and update accordingly.

actions.text: Review and update apps to use the new POS Extensions background target
Update apps to comply with the new App Store Requirements policy 1.3
Prepare for the removal of Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field in Customer Account API version 2026-10
